FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[AddressId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[DeliveryDate], [o].[DiscountAmount], [o].[DiscountPercentage], [o].[OrderTotalAmount], [o].[PromoCodeId], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[TotalProductsCount], [o].[UserId]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o0]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [o0].[UserId] = [u].[UserId]
INNER JOIN [Addresses] AS [a] ON [o0].[AddressId] = [a].[AddressId]
LEFT JOIN [Payments] AS [p] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [p].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN [Refunds] AS [r] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [r].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o1].[OrderDetailsId], [o1].[CreatedAt], [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[ProductId], [o1].[ProductName], [o1].[ProductPrice], [o1].[Quantity], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0], [p0].[ActiveStatus], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[ImagePath], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price]
    FROM [OrderDetails] AS [o1]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p0] ON [o1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
) AS [s] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [s].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [o0].[CreatedAt] DESC, [o0].[OrderId], [u].[UserId], [a].[AddressId], [p].[PaymentId], [r].[RefundId], [s].[OrderDetailsId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[ProductId], [p].[ActiveStatus], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [c].[CategoryId] AS [CategoryId0], [c].[CategoryName], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [s].[StockId], [s].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [s].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0], [s].[Quantity]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Stock] AS [s] ON [p].[ProductId] = [s].[ProductId]
    WHERE [p].[ProductId] = @request_ProductId
) AS [s0]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [s0].[ProductId] = [r].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [s0].[ProductId], [s0].[CategoryId0], [s0].[StockId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[ProductId], [p].[ActiveStatus], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [c].[CategoryId] AS [CategoryId0], [c].[CategoryName], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [s].[StockId], [s].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [s].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0], [s].[Quantity]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Stock] AS [s] ON [p].[ProductId] = [s].[ProductId]
    WHERE [p].[ProductId] = @request_ProductId
) AS [s0]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [s0].[ProductId] = [r].[ProductId]

SELECT [o0].[OrderId], [o0].[AddressId], [o0].[CreatedAt], [o0].[DeliveryDate], [o0].[DiscountAmount], [o0].[DiscountPercentage], [o0].[OrderTotalAmount], [o0].[PromoCodeId], [o0].[Status], [o0].[TotalAmount], [o0].[TotalProductsCount], [o0].[UserId], [u].[UserId], [u].[Active], [u].[CreatedAt], [u].[Email], [u].[Name], [u].[Password], [u].[Role], [u].[SaltValue], [a].[AddressId], [a].[AddressLine1], [a].[AddressLine2], [a].[City], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[Pincode], [a].[State], [a].[UserId], [p].[PaymentId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[OrderId], [p].[PaymentType], [p].[StripePaymentId], [p].[TotalAmount], [p].[UserId], [r].[RefundId], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[OrderId], [r].[PaymentId], [r].[RefundAmount], [r].[UserId], [s].[OrderDetailsId], [s].[CreatedAt], [s].[OrderId], [s].[ProductId], [s].[ProductName], [s].[ProductPrice], [s].[Quantity], [s].[ProductId0], [s].[ActiveStatus], [s].[CategoryId], [s].[CreatedAt0], [s].[Description], [s].[ImagePath], [s].[Name], [s].[Price]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[AddressId], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[DeliveryDate], [o].[DiscountAmount], [o].[DiscountPercentage], [o].[OrderTotalAmount], [o].[PromoCodeId], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[TotalProductsCount], [o].[UserId]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o0]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [o0].[UserId] = [u].[UserId]
INNER JOIN [Addresses] AS [a] ON [o0].[AddressId] = [a].[AddressId]
LEFT JOIN [Payments] AS [p] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [p].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN [Refunds] AS [r] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [r].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o1].[OrderDetailsId], [o1].[CreatedAt], [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[ProductId], [o1].[ProductName], [o1].[ProductPrice], [o1].[Quantity], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0], [p0].[ActiveStatus], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[ImagePath], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price]
    FROM [OrderDetails] AS [o1]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p0] ON [o1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
) AS [s] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [s].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [o0].[CreatedAt] DESC, [o0].[OrderId], [u].[UserId], [a].[AddressId], [p].[PaymentId], [r].[RefundId], [s].[OrderDetailsId]

    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [o0]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [o0].[UserId] = [u].[UserId]
INNER JOIN [Addresses] AS [a] ON [o0].[AddressId] = [a].[AddressId]
LEFT JOIN [Payments] AS [p] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [p].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN [Refunds] AS [r] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [r].[OrderId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o1].[OrderDetailsId], [o1].[CreatedAt], [o1].[OrderId], [o1].[ProductId], [o1].[ProductName], [o1].[ProductPrice], [o1].[Quantity], [p0].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0], [p0].[ActiveStatus], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p0].[Description], [p0].[ImagePath], [p0].[Name], [p0].[Price]
    FROM [OrderDetails] AS [o1]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p0] ON [o1].[ProductId] = [p0].[ProductId]
) AS [s] ON [o0].[OrderId] = [s].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [o0].[CreatedAt] DESC, [o0].[OrderId], [u].[UserId], [a].[AddressId], [p].[PaymentId], [r].[RefundId], [s].[OrderDetailsId]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[ProductId], [p].[ActiveStatus], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [c].[CategoryId] AS [CategoryId0], [c].[CategoryName], [c].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [s].[StockId], [s].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [s].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0], [s].[Quantity]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
    LEFT JOIN [Stock] AS [s] ON [p].[ProductId] = [s].[ProductId]
    WHERE [p].[ProductId] = @request_ProductId
) AS [s0]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [s0].[ProductId] = [r].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [s0].[ProductId], [s0].[CategoryId0], [s0].[StockId]

    SELECT [w].[WishListId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[UserId], [w].[WhishListName]
    FROM [WishList] AS [w]
    WHERE [w].[UserId] = @userId
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [w1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[WishListItemsId], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[ProductId], [w0].[WishListId], [p].[ProductId] AS [ProductId0], [p].[ActiveStatus], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price]
    FROM [WishListItems] AS [w0]
    INNER JOIN [Products] AS [p] ON [w0].[ProductId] = [p].[ProductId]
) AS [s] ON [w1].[WishListId] = [s].[WishListId]
ORDER BY [w1].[WishListId], [s].[WishListItemsId]

SELECT [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[Name], [p0].[ImagePath], [p0].[Description], [c].[CategoryName], [p0].[Price], [s].[StockId], [s].[Quantity], [c].[CategoryId], [r].[ReviewId], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ProductId], [r].[ReviewPoints], [r].[Summary], [r].[UserId], [r0].[Summary], [r0].[ReviewPoints], [r0].[ReviewId]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[ActiveStatus] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
LEFT JOIN [Stock] AS [s] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [s].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [r].[ProductId]

SELECT [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[CategoryId], [p0].[Name], [p0].[ImagePath], [p0].[Description], [c].[CategoryName], [p0].[Price], [s].[StockId], [s].[Quantity], [c].[CategoryId], [r].[ReviewId], [r].[CreatedAt], [r].[ProductId], [r].[ReviewPoints], [r].[Summary], [r].[UserId], [r0].[Summary], [r0].[ReviewPoints], [r0].[ReviewId]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[ProductId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Description], [p].[ImagePath], [p].[Name], [p].[Price]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[ActiveStatus] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [p0]
INNER JOIN [Category] AS [c] ON [p0].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
LEFT JOIN [Stock] AS [s] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [s].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [r].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [Reviews] AS [r0] ON [p0].[ProductId] = [r0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [p0].[Name], [p0].[ProductId], [c].[CategoryId], [s].[StockId], [r].[ReviewId]
